generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor measuring occupancy patterns within operational buildings, transmitting real-time occupancy data to the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring light levels within building spaces, providing real-time illumination data for adaptive lighting control systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor collecting real-time indoor environmental conditions, supporting HVAC system optimization and occupant comfort analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Multi-parameter sensor measuring combined environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, CO2 levels) for comprehensive building climate monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational Building Information Model enriched with device metadata, control logic, and spatial relationships serving as the semantic backbone for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngine
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation output containing sensor readings, actuator states, and control parameters generated from BIM-to-Ditto/Hono configurations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, EclipseHono
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics model for energy consumption forecasting and occupant comfort simulations, integrated with reinforcement learning capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns collected from physical sensors, processed for visualization, analytics, and control logic generation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualization
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated environmental measurements (temperature, light levels, humidity) contextualized with BIM-enriched metadata for system validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance ControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime control parameters derived from simulation models and reinforcement learning, deployed to Building Control Systems for adaptive adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data ingestion and device management middleware enabling standardized communication with IoT sensors and actuators through bidirectional protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataIngestion
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bidirectional twinning interface facilitating control logic deployment, state synchronization, and actuator control via standardized APIs."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlLogicDeployment, ActuatorInterface
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization platform supporting immersive monitoring, control, and user interface development for Digital Twin applications."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualization
]

instance ModelDrivenEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating BIM-to-DigitalTwin transformations, reducing manual configuration efforts in deployment pipelines."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichmentTool
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive control policy optimization engine leveraging BOREALIS project methodologies for continuous improvement of building management systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance BIMEnrichmentTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Extension to BIM tools (Revit/ArchiCAD) adding runtime semantics including device configurations and control logic for operational deployment."
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D monitoring and control interface enabling Facility Managers to interact with real-time building data through Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight, EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance ControlLogicDeployment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of control policies to Building Control Systems via Eclipse Ditto, enabling real-time adjustments to lighting, HVAC, and energy systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingAction, HVACOptimizationAction
]

instance SensorDataIngestion : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data aggregation and normalization service processing sensor streams from physical systems through Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataValidationInsight
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Standardized device registration and management interface enabling seamless integration of IoT devices with the Digital Twin infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceHealthInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service optimizing energy consumption through reinforcement learning-based policy recommendations and simulation outputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyForecastInsight, ConsumptionOptimizationAction
]

instance ActuatorInterface : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication interface between Digital Twin and physical actuators enabling real-time state adjustments and control logic execution."
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalStateSynchronizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of occupancy patterns within building spaces enabling space utilization analysis and optimization."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive display of environmental conditions (temperature, light, humidity) supporting occupant comfort and operational efficiency monitoring."
]

instance DataValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated validation results for incoming sensor data streams ensuring data consistency and completeness before processing."
]

instance DeviceHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of device operational status and connectivity within the IoT network supporting predictive maintenance planning."
]

instance EnergyForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output forecasting energy consumption patterns based on current operational conditions and historical data."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy patterns and environmental conditions to optimize energy use and occupant experience."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic control of HVAC systems through reinforcement learning-optimized parameters for energy efficiency and occupant comfort."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConsumptionOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "System-wide energy consumption optimization recommendations deployed to Building Control Systems for immediate implementation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalStateSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time confirmation of state synchronization between Digital Twin control parameters and physical actuator implementations."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator responsible for executing adaptive lighting control logic derived from the Digital Twin's optimization policies."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System component managing HVAC system operations based on real-time data and control parameters from the Digital Twin."
]

instance EnergyManagementSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized system coordinating energy consumption optimization across multiple building systems based on Digital Twin recommendations."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical and virtual environment encompassing building infrastructure systems including lighting, HVAC, and environmental monitoring components."
    base:contains LightingActuator, HVACController, OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor,
                 TemperatureSensor, EnvironmentalSensor, BIMModel, RuntimeDataModel
]

// C5: Data Transmitted (additional for complex flows)
instance SimulationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationModel
]

instance ControlParametersTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControlParameters
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interactions are implemented via **runtime-generated control signals** from the DT to actuators and controllers in the BCS. These signals are derived from **optimization algorithms, reinforcement learning models (e.g., BOREALIS project), or user-defined control logic** embedded within the DT. The framework uses **Eclipse Ditto** to publish control commands to physical systems, ensuring low-latency execution of adjustments (e.g., lighting adjustments, energy optimizations) based on virtual processing."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **multiple time scales**:
    - **Real-time synchronization** (e.g., millisecond to second-level updates for operational control, such as lighting adjustments).
    - **Near-real-time analytics** (e.g., post-occupancy data processing in BOREALIS for iterative policy improvements).
    - **Long-term lifecycle monitoring** (e.g., annual or decadal performance tracking for building optimization)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: The semantic foundation for physical asset representation.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono (data ingestion) and Ditto (twinning interfaces).
   - **Control Layer**: Hosts runtime logic (e.g., control algorithms, optimization models).
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D monitoring.
   - **Extension Points**: Modular interfaces for custom services (e.g., IoT integrations, AI plugins).
   The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous building infrastructures, with **standardized APIs** for interoperability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life-cycle stages** of a building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During the design phase, the DT leverages BIM for **static modeling and clash detection**. In construction, it supports **device configuration and commissioning**. During operation, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, adaptive control, and performance optimization**. The framework also includes mechanisms for **post-occupancy evaluation** (e.g., BOREALIS project) to refine control policies over time."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** to measure how well the DT reflects its physical counterpart.
    - **Verification and validation** of BIM models and runtime artifacts (e.g., ensuring sensor data accuracy and control logic correctness).
    - **Uncertainty management** (e.g., handling semantic drift where digital and physical models diverge over time).
    The framework addresses these challenges via automated synchronization and modular extensibility."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT system employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** as middleware for technical connectivity, facilitating **real-time data exchange** between physical and virtual domains. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP, REST) or data formats (e.g., JSON, Protobuf) are not enumerated, the framework leverages **standardized metadata** (e.g., tenant IDs, device IDs, endpoint addresses) to configure these middleware components. The connection architecture supports **bidirectional communication**, enabling both sensor data ingestion and control signal deployment."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT system is designed for **scalable deployment** within AECO contexts, leveraging **service-oriented architectures** to accommodate heterogeneous building systems. The document does not specify **cloud-native**, **edge-computing**, or **containerized deployment** (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) technologies. However, the emphasis on **modularity** and **scalability** implies flexibility in hosting environments, though exact deployment strategies are not detailed."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT system supports **horizontal integration** through:
   - **Standardized extension points**: Allowing seamless connection to external information systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) via middleware interfaces.
   - **Interoperability frameworks**: Enabling communication with non-trivial control strategies and heterogeneous building systems.
   - **Modular service architecture**: Facilitating integration with third-party analytics, simulations, or automation tools. While specific standards (e.g., RESTful APIs, ERP systems) or brokers (e.g., Mosquitto) are not named, the document emphasizes **interoperability** as a core design principle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT system adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which serves as its semantic foundation. The framework also leverages **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)** methodologies for standardized model transformations. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, BACnet, KNX, MOF, QVT) are not enumerated, the document highlights the importance of **interoperability** and **semantic integration** within the AECO domain."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
    - **Cybersecurity**: Protection of data in transit (e.g., encrypted communication via middleware) and at rest (e.g., secure storage).
    - **Safety**: The DT can execute remote operations (e.g., lighting adjustments) but must ensure no direct human safety risks (e.g., via fail-safes or manual override mechanisms).
    The document does not detail specific safety protocols but highlights the need for robust system design to prevent accidents."
]
